parameters.content:
## WF2: Contact Discovery

**Main Flow**: Read Approved -> Preserve -> Clearbit -> Merge -> Extract Signals -> Read All Contacts (alwaysOutputData) -> Compute Hunter Offset -> Hunter.io (with offset) -> Score & Rank -> Confidence Gate -> Write Contacts -> Update Opportunity -> WF3

**Archive Branch**: Schedule only - archives unchecked rows after 2 days.
**Reject Branch**: Manual trigger - archives + deletes rows marked 'reject'.

**Offset logic**: Read All Contacts has alwaysOutputData=true so empty Contacts tab still passes 1 placeholder item. Compute Hunter Offset filters it out and outputs N items (1 per opportunity) with correct hunter_offset.
